summary: AtBat subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user has AtBat entitlement
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is scheduled/in-progress

AtBat entitlements = MLBAUDIO, IPHONEATBAT, ANDROIDATBAT, SUBSCRIBERVOD

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile with a Blackout pill
steps.result:
THEN the feed select modal displays
AND video feed buttons are not displayed
AND a blackout messaging is displayed in the Feed Select modal
